title: The Midnight Library

description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever.

title: Where the Crawdads Sing
author: Delia Owens
description: A heartbreaking coming-of-age story and a surprising tale of possible murder.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A science fiction story set on the desert planet Arrakis.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut must save the earth from disaster.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt
description: Your journey to mastery in software development.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: The big ideas behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems.

title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
description: A series of personal writings by the Roman Emperor on Stoic philosophy.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: A landmark volume in science writing exploring cosmology.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: The story of fifteen billion years of cosmic evolution.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A shocking psychological thriller of a woman’s act of violence against her husband.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Explores how biology and history have defined us.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian social science fiction novel.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A novel about racial inequality told through the eyes of a child.

title: The Lean Startup
author: Eric Ries
description: How constant innovation creates radically successful businesses.

title: Refactoring
author: Martin Fowler
description: A guide to improving the design of existing code.

title: Design Patterns
author: Erich Gamma
description: Elements of reusable object-oriented software.

title: The Gene: An Intimate History
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: A sweeping history of the quest to decipher the master-code of humans.

title: Astrophysics for People in a Hurry
author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
description: A clear introduction to the universe.

title: Brief Answers to the Big Questions

description: A reflection on the most profound questions of the universe.
